nodes.name: Webhook — Attio New Lead
nodes.notes: Attio Workflow 'Record created -> HTTP request' POSTs the lead JSON here. Use the PRODUCTION URL once the workflow is ACTIVE.

nodes.name: Extract Lead Fields
nodes.notes: Flattens contracts/lead.schema.json into top-level fields. Could be a Set/Edit-Fields node instead.

nodes.name: Match Listings
nodes.notes: SWAP FOR SUPERLINKED: replace with an HTTP Request node hitting your Superlinked /query endpoint; keep the 'matches' array shape identical.

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp (Twilio)
nodes.notes: From = Twilio WhatsApp SANDBOX number +14155238886 (replace if yours differs). 'toWhatsapp' prefixes both numbers with whatsapp:. Recipient must have texted 'join <code>' to the sandbox first.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ data: { values: { name: 'WhatsApp outreach - ' + ($('Extract Lead Fields').item.json.name || 'lead'), channel: 'whatsapp', lead_email: $('Extract Lead Fields').item.json.email, lead_phone: $('Extract Lead Fields').item.json.phone, matched_listings: ($('Match Listings').item.json.matches || []).map(m => m.id).join(', '), message_sent: $('Build WhatsApp Message').item.json.message, twilio_sid: $json.sid || null, twilio_status: $json.status || null, outreach_at: $now.toISO() } } }) }}

nodes.name: Log Outreach to Attio
nodes.notes: POST creates an 'outreach' record. Swap to PUT .../records?matching_attribute=<slug> for idempotent upserts. Attio value shapes vary by attribute type (some need arrays) - verify slugs/shapes with one real call. Prefer moving the Bearer token into an 'HTTP Header Auth' credential for the real demo.
